item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Tidak semua kepentingan masyarakat bersifat mutlak; beberapa kepentingan kelompok bisa bertentangan dengan hak pribadi, sehingga perlunya pengawasan eksternal menjadi penting.

notes: Both agents converge toward balance. Agent A starts society-first but increasingly accepts rights protection, control mechanisms, and external oversight. Agent B starts rights-first but moves toward balance and accepts external control against group domination while retaining the U.S. procedural-rights frame. Agent A uses a mixed-case opener, but the position is still readable.
